name: Mimosa Crystals
recipeInstructions:
1. Dry the flowers thoroughly.
2. Dissolve gum arabic in half a cup of hot water and let it cool.
3. Carefully coat the petals with the cooled mixture, ensuring they do not touch each other on wax paper.
4. In another half cup of water, mix corn syrup and sugar until it reaches a soft ball consistency when tested.
5. Dip the petals into this syrup mixture and allow them to dry completely.
6. Finally, sprinkle finely granulated sugar over the dried petals.
